name: tv-mcp
description: MCP server + CLI bridging Claude Code to TradingView running in Chrome (via Chrome DevTools Protocol).

scripts.test: node --test tests/e2e.test.js tests/pine_analyze.test.js tests/pin_registry.test.js tests/tab_picker.test.js tests/setup.test.js tests/data_strategy_helpers.test.js
scripts.test:unit: node --test tests/pine_analyze.test.js tests/cli.test.js tests/pin_registry.test.js tests/tab_picker.test.js tests/setup.test.js tests/data_strategy_helpers.test.js
scripts.test:all: node --test tests/e2e.test.js tests/pine_analyze.test.js tests/cli.test.js tests/pin_registry.test.js tests/tab_picker.test.js tests/setup.test.js tests/data_strategy_helpers.test.js
scripts.test:verbose: node --test --test-reporter=spec tests/e2e.test.js tests/pine_analyze.test.js tests/pin_registry.test.js tests/tab_picker.test.js tests/setup.test.js tests/data_strategy_helpers.test.js
